Video.summary: A stray dog loyal to Bill Gentry is the only witness in the murder of Susan Sayres's father.
Video.title: The Third Passenger

Video.summary: Ex-outlaw Belle Starr goes after the D.A. who ridiculed her illiterate husband.
Video.title: A Bullet for the D.A.

Video.summary: An unarmed Navajo sets out to avenge the murder and robbery of a Native elder.
Video.title: Experiment in Fear

Video.summary: Fred Curry and Jesse Blount feud after they each file claims to the same mine.
Video.title: Feud at Dome Rock

Video.summary: A lawyer who has turned to the bottle is ostracized when he refuses to help a miner.
Video.title: Justice at Jackson Creek

Video.summary: A princess agrees to be treated by a medical pioneer who uses a new method: blood transfusion.
Video.title: Bloodline

Video.summary: A woman falls in love with a man she was planning to rob.
Video.title: The Vintage Years

Video.summary: Lawmen Pete Gabriel and Joe Phy were friends, then Kitty Bolton came along.
Video.title: Loss of Faith

Video.summary: The man Kit Carson saved from death in the desert turns out to be his wife's ex-fiance.
Video.title: Stubborn Mule Hill

Video.summary: An attorney takes the case of a famed gunman who is charged with murder.
Video.title: Diamond Field Jack

Video.summary: In 1862 Utah, the employees of a stagecoach depot encounter an orphaned Native boy.
Video.title: Little Cayuse

Video.summary: As survivors of the Donner Party recuperate, William Eddy grieves the loss of his wife and children.
Video.title: The Hastings Cut-off

Video.summary: The story of Wyatt, Virgil, Morgan Earp and Doc Holliday after their gunfight with outlaws.
Video.title: After the O.K. Corral

Video.summary: Jeremy is a crew member on a blackbirding ship that inhumanely captures and enslaves native peoples.
Video.title: Showdown at Kamaaina Flats

Video.summary: A charlatan rainmaker sparks a range war.
Video.title: Big John and the Rainmaker

Video.summary: A kindhearted saloon singer nurses a gunfighter back to health.
Video.title: The Left Hand Is Damned

Video.summary: A lawyer (Ronald Reagan) sues a man who killed a boy's dog.
Video.title: Tribute to the Dog

Video.summary: Ronald Reagan plays a sheriff who tries enforcing the law without a gun.
Video.title: No Gun Behind His Badge

Video.summary: A minister's attempts to rebuild a church in Carson City are blocked by a saloon owner.
Video.title: Fighting Sky Pilot

Video.summary: Angered by increasing federal mining taxes, the citizens vote to secede from the U.S.
Video.title: Birthright

Video.summary: A Quaker farmer undertakes a journey out west with apple-tree seedlings.
Video.title: Traveling Trees

Video.summary: Susan Magoffin, accompanying her husband West, becomes the first woman to travel the Santa Fe Trail.
Video.title: No Place for a Lady

Video.summary: A crew of mine developers ingeniously races against time to make it from Arizona to San Diego.
Video.title: A City Is Born

Video.summary: Everyone's deserting wagon master Ezra Meeker - except his wife and an accused murderer.
Video.title: Devil's Gate

Video.summary: Mormon emigrant Jessica Scott loses her baby in unknown territory while traveling to Utah.
Video.title: The Red Shawl

Video.summary: A freight hauler marries a rich girl by mistake and has a week to court her before it is annulled.
Video.title: The Courtship of Carrie Huntington

Video.summary: California's ex-governor stops a war.
Video.title: The Firebrand

Video.summary: Joseph Ridges has crafted an organ and is charged with bringing it safely to Salt Lake City.
Video.title: An Organ for Brother Brigham

Video.summary: A priest claims the marriages in a town are void.
Video.title: The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled

Image.alt: The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled

Video.summary: Calamity Jane meets Wild Bill Hickok.
Video.title: A Calamity Called Jane

Video.summary: A widowed magician saves his young apprentice.
Video.title: The Saga of Dr. Davis

Video.summary: In Apache country, a missionary engages in a philosophic battle with an escaped murderer.
Video.title: A Man Called Abraham

Video.summary: A rivalry over a pretty woman inadvertently causes trouble between cavalrymen and Natives.
Video.title: The Hero of Fort Halleck

Video.summary: A woman finds a family heirloom in the possession of a junk collector who demands payment for it.
Video.title: A Bargain Is for Keeping

Video.summary: Deputy Jim Brand hatches a plan to thwart a corrupt railroad lawyer.
Video.title: The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup

Image.alt: The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup
The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup
The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup
The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup
The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup
The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup
The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup
The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup
The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup

Video.summary: A cowboy becomes an expert baker while competing for the daughter of a rancher.
Video.title: Crullers at Sundown!

Video.summary: A four-dollar lawsuit is brought against an insurance company by a farmer who claims he was cheated.
Video.title: The Four-Dollar Law Suit

Video.summary: A sheriff pursues deadly gunslinger Sam Bolt and finds an unlikely ally in one of Bolt's partners.
Video.title: Brute Angel

Video.summary: A psychic leads the way to rescue ambush survivors.
Video.title: The Man Who Wouldn't Die

Video.summary: Prospector Jim Otis is taken hostage by robbers after he stumbles onto their loot.
Video.title: Solid Foundation
